title: viviania marifolia
intro: Viviania marifolia, also known as sea lavender or rock lavender, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Viviania marifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
